NeedDef.label: royal jelly
NeedDef.description: The more consistently a child vivi consumes Royal Jelly, the more its effects accumulate, influencing the moment when vivi becomes an adult. If it is completely filled when Vivi matures, Vivi becomes a Royal Vivi; otherwise, Vivi becomes a normal Vivi. \nRoyal vivis can reproduce, have high social ability and psychic sensitivity, and possess several unique abilities, but their work capability is low.
